overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street during golden hour. The scene features towering glass buildings, digital billboards on overhead structures, cherry blossom trees, and futuristic vehicles passing by. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced graphics and neon-lit urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to commercial glass tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a large glass building, approaching a digital overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall commercial building with distinctive grid-patterned glass facade reflecting golden hour sunlight
elevated structure spanning the road with multiple digital billboards and neon signage
yellow concrete barriers with vegetation separating sidewalk from the street
black sign with white text reading DELAMAIN attached to the planter barrier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking alongside a massive grid-patterned glass building in a futuristic city. The camera moves steadily forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by yellow planter barriers. A digital overpass with glowing billboards looms ahead in the distance, while sparse traffic passes by on the right. The golden hour lighting casts warm reflections off the building's facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under digital billboard overpass

events.description: walking underneath the digital overpass structure, entering a covered area with artificial lighting from overhead screens
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the right, including a green sports car and a black sedan

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, passing a distinctive pink cherry blossom tree planted in the median

notable_agents.action: green futuristic sports car speeding past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tree with vibrant pink blossoms planted in the center median between road lanes
digital advertisement screen displaying NCOLA branding on the right side of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the massive digital overpass, entering a semi-covered zone where the sky is mostly blocked by the structure overhead. A striking cherry blossom tree with pink flowers stands in the center median. The lighting shifts to artificial neon glow from the digital billboards above. Vehicles continue to pass on the right as the camera moves through the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane avenue with heavy digital signage

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into direct golden hour sunlight, creating lens flare and long shadows
increased traffic density with multiple lanes of futuristic vehicles passing by

agents.ego_description: walking along the avenue as the sun becomes visible ahead, casting warm light across the street

notable_agents.action: black armored vehicle driving past followed by a red sports car

entered.detail: large green neon billboard displaying a samurai figure with a sword
raised highway structure running parallel to the street on the right side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a wide avenue bathed in golden hour sunlight. A large green neon samurai sign dominates the left side of the frame. The sun sits low on the horizon ahead, creating lens flare effects. Traffic density increases with various futuristic vehicles passing by on the multi-lane road, while an elevated highway structure becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban highway approach with distant city towers

events.description: slight adjustment in walking direction to navigate around the planter barriers while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along the avenue toward the setting sun, with heavy traffic passing on both sides

notable_agents.action: convoy of futuristic cars including a purple sedan and white coupe passing by

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers and industrial structures visible on the horizon against the sunset
additional digital billboard overpass structure visible further down the avenue

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking toward the bright sun on the horizon, creating a strong backlit effect. The street stretches ahead toward distant city towers and additional overpass structures. Heavy traffic flows past with various colorful futuristic vehicles. The warm golden light dominates the scene as the camera continues its steady progression down the avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a sleek architectural corridor into a wide, sun-drenched futuristic avenue. It begins by moving steadily along a massive grid-patterned glass building, where golden hour light reflects off the facade as the camera approaches a distant digital overpass. As the camera passes beneath this structure, the environment shifts into a semi-covered zone dominated by the artificial neon glow of billboards and the soft pink of a central cherry blossom tree. The scene then opens back into the sunlight, revealing a wide avenue featuring a large green neon samurai sign and an elevated highway as the traffic density increases. Finally, the camera advances directly toward the low sun on the horizon, creating a strong backlit effect against a backdrop of distant city towers and flowing futuristic vehicles.
